import React, { useState } from "react"; import "../css/propertyDetails.css"; import { FaMapMarkerAlt, FaBed, FaBath, FaRulerCombined, FaHeart, FaRegHeart, FaShareAlt, FaArrowLeft, FaCheckCircle, FaPhoneAlt, FaCommentDots, FaCalendarAlt, FaShieldAlt, FaWifi, FaCar, FaDumbbell, FaSnowflake, FaUtensils, FaVideo, FaBolt, FaArrowRight, FaChevronLeft, FaChevronRight, FaHome, FaStar, FaRegStar, FaCopy, FaWhatsapp } from "react-icons/fa"; /* ─── MOCK PROPERTY DATA ─── */ const PROPERTY = { id: 9, type: "Apartment", title: "3BHK Luxury Apartment", location: "Saravanampatti", fullAddress: "Saravanampatti, Coimbatore — 641035", price: 20000, deposit: 60000, beds: 3, baths: 2, area: 1350, floor: "4th Floor", totalFloors: 8, facing: "East", furnished: "Semi-Furnished", parking: "Covered", availableFrom: "April 1, 2026", badge: "New", rating: 4.5, reviews: 12, description: `This stunning 3BHK apartment in Saravanampatti offers the perfect blend of comfort and style. Located in a gated community with 24/7 security, the property features spacious rooms with ample natural lighting. The apartment is situated close to major IT parks, schools, and hospitals, making it ideal for families and working professionals. The building comes with premium amenities including a gymnasium, rooftop garden, and covered parking.`, amenities: [ { icon: , label: "High-Speed WiFi" }, { icon: , label: "Gymnasium" }, { icon: , label: "Covered Parking" }, { icon: , label: "AC in all rooms" }, { icon: , label: "24/7 Security" }, { icon: , label: "Power Backup" }, { icon: , label: "Modular Kitchen" }, { icon: , label: "CCTV Surveillance" }, ], images: [ "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545324418-cc1a3fa10c00?w=900&q=80", "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1502672260266-1c1ef2d93688?w=900&q=80", "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512917774080-9991f1c4c750?w=900&q=80", "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560185127-6ed189bf02f4?w=900&q=80", "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580587771525-78b9dba3b914?w=900&q=80", ], owner: { name: "Rajesh Kumar", phone: "+91 98765 43210", email: "rajesh@rentspace.in", avatar: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=100&q=80", listedSince: "2023", totalListings: 5, responseTime: "Within 1 hour", }, mapLat: 11.0509, mapLng: 76.9930, }; /* ─── SIMILAR PROPERTIES ─── */ const SIMILAR = [ { id:10, type:"Apartment", title:"1BHK Apartment", location:"Peelamedu", price:10000, beds:1, baths:1, image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1502672260266-1c1ef2d93688?w=400&q=80" }, { id:11, type:"Apartment", title:"2BHK Modern Apartment", location:"Gandhipuram", price:14000, beds:2, baths:2, image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512917774080-9991f1c4c750?w=400&q=80" }, { id:12, type:"Apartment", title:"2BHK Gated Community", location:"Tidel Park", price:18000, beds:2, baths:2, image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580587771525-78b9dba3b914?w=400&q=80" }, ]; export default function PropertyDetail() { const [activeImg, setActiveImg] = useState(0); const [wishlisted, setWishlisted] = useState(false); const [showPhone, setShowPhone] = useState(false); const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("overview"); const prevImg = () => setActiveImg(i => (i - 1 + PROPERTY.images.length) % PROPERTY.images.length); const nextImg = () => setActiveImg(i => (i + 1) % PROPERTY.images.length); const handleCopy = () => { navigator.clipboard.writeText(window.location.href); setCopied(true); setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000); }; const renderStars = (rating) => { return Array.from({ length: 5 }, (_, i) => i < Math.floor(rating) ? : ); }; return (
{/* ── NAVBAR ── */}
RentSpace
Home Rentals Login Register
{/* ── BREADCRUMB ── */}
Back to Listings / {PROPERTY.type} / {PROPERTY.location}
{/* ── LEFT COLUMN ── */}
{/* IMAGE GALLERY */}
{PROPERTY.badge}
{activeImg + 1} / {PROPERTY.images.length}
{/* THUMBNAILS */}
{PROPERTY.images.map((img, i) => (
setActiveImg(i)} >
))}
{/* TABS */}
{["overview", "amenities", "map"].map(t => ( ))}
{/* ── OVERVIEW TAB ── */} {activeTab === "overview" && (

{PROPERTY.fullAddress}

{/* QUICK STATS */}

{PROPERTY.baths} Bathrooms
{PROPERTY.area} Sq. Ft
{PROPERTY.floor} Floor
{/* DETAILS GRID */}
{[ ["Property Type", PROPERTY.type], ["Furnished", PROPERTY.furnished], ["Facing", PROPERTY.facing], ["Parking", PROPERTY.parking], ["Total Floors", PROPERTY.totalFloors], ["Available From", PROPERTY.availableFrom], ].map(([k, v]) => (
{k} {v}
))}
{/* DESCRIPTION */}

About this Property

{/* RATINGS */}

)} {/* ── AMENITIES TAB ── */} {activeTab === "amenities" && (

Amenities & Features

{a.icon}
{a.label}
))}
)} {/* ── MAP TAB ── */} {activeTab === "map" && (
